screen_example.title: Welcome on The $t(common_appName.full)
screen_example.description: Do you want to discover some features? Just click on one of the three buttons at the bottom of the screen. The first allows you to call a REST API. The second lets you change the theme color. And the third allows you to change the language.

error_boundary.title: Oops! Something went wrong.
error_boundary.description: We are sorry for the inconvenience. Please try again later.

login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Sign in to access your wardrobe

errors.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address
errors.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters

screen_welcome.title: Welcome to Auxi
screen_welcome.subtitle: Get simple outfit suggestions that work for your day

welcome.headline:

verified.error_generic: We couldn't verify right now. Try again in a moment.

mood.title: How did this outfit feel?
mood.subtitle: This helps us understand your style and mood better.
mood.errorGeneric: Unable to save your feedback. Please try again.

mood.savedBanner: This look is now saved to your favorites.
mood.moodUpdatedBanner: Mood updated for this saved look.

common.try_again_moment: Please try again in a moment.

home.seen_all_hint: You've seen them all — suggestions will repeat
home.save_failed_retry: Couldn’t save this look. Tap "Wear this" to retry.
home.error_load_body: Check your connection and try again.

home.a11y_add_to_wardrobe: Add an item to your wardrobe
home.a11y_your_piece: Your piece — a recently added item

pin.modal_subtitle: We'll keep this piece and remix the rest.
pin.fallback_message: We couldn't fully match this item, but here's the closest fit.

pin.item_unavailable: This item is no longer available.
pin.guest_blocker: Sign in to pin items and build around them.

body.toast_load_failed_body: Could not load your body photo. Please try again.
body.tryon_failed: Could not generate your try-on image. Please try again.
body.no_photo_hint: No body photo yet. Tap Retake to add one.
body.photo_helps: This photo helps show how outfits look on you
body.upload_to_generate: Upload a full-body photo to generate your try-on image.
body.helper_clear_fullbody: Use a clear, full-body photo so the try-on result can match your proportions.
body.helper_tap_to_use: Tap a photo to use it for this look. Long press any photo to remove it.
body.section_body: Upload clear, full-body photos once so future try-on results line up with your proportions.
body.helper_tap_default: Tap a photo to make it the default preview. Long press any photo to delete it.
body.empty_photos: No body photos yet. Upload your first one to unlock outfit try-on.

settings.direction_balanced_desc: Keep learning from my daily choices. No specific bias.
settings.title: Settings
settings.dialog_delete_body: Auxi will revert to day one. This cannot be undone.

locationPermission.denied_body: We need location permission to suggest outfits based on local weather. Please enable it in settings.
locationPermission.intro: To suggest an outfit that works today, I need your local weather.

contextChips.placeholder: Tell us what you'd like to change

favourite.title: Favourite
favourite.empty_body: Tap "Wear this" button to add an outfit
favourite.remove_body: Are you sure to remove this outfit from your favourite list

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.subtitle: Tell us what's working and what isn't. Your notes go straight to the team.

feedback.error_rate_limit: You've sent a lot of feedback just now. Please try again in a minute.

seeThisOnMe.title: Self visualization
seeThisOnMe.optIn: Use this photo for future outfit previews
seeThisOnMe.privacy: Your photos are always kept private
seeThisOnMe.error: We couldn't create your look. Please try again.

errors.noPerson: Please upload a photo of yourself showing your body, so we can show the outfit on you.
errors.upload: We couldn't check that photo. Please check your connection and try again.
errors.generate: We couldn't create your look. Please try again.

step1.prompt: 1/3 - Start with a selfie photo. No need to be perfect, you can change it later.

step2.prompt: 2/3 - Add a full-body photo. Optional, but it helps Macgie understand proportions and styling better.

step3.prompt: 3/3 - Choose the shape that feels most like you. Tap to expand
step3.expandedTitle: Choose the shape that feels most like you.

reuseConfirm.prompt: Here's the body photo you saved. Use it again, or retake your photos.

quit.hint: This can take a moment. You can leave — we’ll let you know the second it’s ready.

notify.failedBody: Tap to go back and try again.
